Read if you want:

Hello guys ! No I am not dead lmaoo, I just had to take some time away to focus on personal stuff, I actually have a life. Also I’m sorry if I never got back to you on discord, I hate that app lolol. But anyways, I’m back for now! Hiii :3

Also how do you get verified ?

But aside from that, I hope yall enjoy the bot. Also little life update, if you’ve been around you know that I had that whole situationship thing, but that’s over now. It was terrible while it lasted, but now he’s calling me some crazy bitch so it is what it is LOL.

One more thing, remember that calling me or anyone who uses these bots faggots is literally the most unoriginal thing ever, so at least be creative lol. But nonetheless your review will be deleted and you’ll be blocked.
